api_identity.name: Project Gutenberg Bookmarked API
api_identity.notes: Specifies full payload schemas, null handling conventions, error structures, and query parameters to ensure correct client-side mapping.

global_security.notes: Required for all endpoints except '/' (docs portal), '/health/', and '/static/' asset requests.

401_unauthorized.description: Returned when the API Key is missing or invalid.

response.message: Missing or invalid API key. Set X-Api-Key in request headers.

403_forbidden.description: Returned when attempting write operations (POST/PUT/DELETE) without administrative permissions.

404_not_found.description: Returned when the requested URL path, book ID, or resource does not exist.

500_internal_server_error.description: Caught by server-side JsonExceptionMiddleware to ensure mobile client receives structured JSON instead of HTML traceback.

response.message: An unexpected error occurred on the server. Please check the logs or contact support.

503_service_unavailable.description: Heroku H12 Router Timeout (triggered if database lock or connection queue holds request > 30 seconds).

search_tokenizer_rules.description: To prevent timeouts and GIN index scanning overhead on punctuation or common words, queries are normalized before execution:
rules: Splitting: Search queries are split into terms on all non-alphanumeric boundaries (whitespace, hyphens, quotes, symbols).
Punctuation Stripping: All symbols (e.g. ';', '--', SQL keywords) are discarded. A query containing only symbols (like '   ' or '--;') returns all books unfiltered (no-op).
1-Character Exclusions: If a search contains multiple terms, terms that are only 1 character long (e.g. 'l' in 'l\'histoire') are ignored, and only longer terms are matched.
Execution Order: Terms are sorted to run non-stop-words first (longest words first), and the matching ID space is iteratively narrowed down in memory. This reduces query times from 30s to <25ms.

name.notes: Author/Editor/Translator name cleaned of birth/death years.

birth_year.notes: 4-digit year of birth, null if unknown.

death_year.notes: 4-digit year of death, null if unknown.

title.notes: Cleaned book title, null if unknown.

authors.notes: Will be empty list if unknown.

copyright.notes: true if copyrighted, false if public domain, null if unknown.

formats.notes: Map of MIME-type strings to URL strings. Cover image formats point to Amazon S3 CDN presigned URLs.

download_count.notes: Popularity ranking metric, null if unknown.

summaries.notes: Short descriptions enriched from Open Library.

endpoints.name: API Documentation Portal
endpoints.description: Developer landing page, interactive dashboard, and live API request playground.

endpoints.name: System Diagnostics Health Check
endpoints.description: Performs diagnostics verifying live PostgreSQL database and S3 Bucketeer storage connectivity.
endpoints.notes: Exempted from API Key validation so monitoring systems can poll it easily.

endpoints.name: Search Autocomplete Suggestions
endpoints.description: Exposes lightweight search recommendations suitable for instant search-as-you-type inputs in the app.

q.description: Min 2 characters search term. Subject to standard search tokenizer rules (stripped of punctuation/symbols).

endpoints.notes: Returns top 10 matching books sorted by download count. match_field indicates where the query matched first: 'title', 'author', 'summary', 'subject', or 'bookshelf'.

endpoints.name: Books Metadata Catalog List
endpoints.description: Retrieve catalog book details. Supports pagination, sorting, search, and criteria filtering.

page.description: Page number to view (defaults to page 1).

search.description: Case-insensitive terms matching author names, book titles, summaries, subjects, or bookshelves. Follows the search tokenizer rules (punctuation stripped, stop words sorted last).

copyright.description: Filter by copyright status: 'true' (copyrighted), 'false' (public domain), or 'null'.

author_year_start.description: Filters books with authors alive after this year.

author_year_end.description: Filters books with authors alive before this year.

ids.description: Comma-separated list of positive Gutenberg IDs (e.g. '11,12,13').

mime_type.description: Filters by format MIME types starting with value (e.g. 'text/html').

topic.description: Matches keyword inside bookshelves or subjects.

endpoints.notes: The next and previous fields are strings containing the direct URL of the next/previous page, or null if on the first/last page.

endpoints.name: Individual Book Details
endpoints.description: Fetch catalog metadata for a single specific book.
endpoints.notes: Writing/deleting requires Admin session cookies (API Key is read-only). Gutenberg ID maps to Project Gutenberg catalog book ID.

endpoints.name: Languages Lookups List
endpoints.description: List all language codes present in the database to populate search filters dynamically in the mobile app.
endpoints.notes: Returned without pagination limits for simpler dropdown select mappings.

endpoints.name: Bookshelves Lookups List
endpoints.description: List all bookshelf names to populate category tags or list navigation filters dynamically.

endpoints.name: Subjects Lookups List
endpoints.description: List all book subject descriptions for tag browsing.

endpoints.name: Request Ebook Cache Job
endpoints.description: Trigger dynamic S3 caching check and Gutenberg mirror fetch. Used to download books without triggering 30s router timeouts.

302.description: Cache Hit. Automatically redirects to the secure S3 Presigned download URL.

202.description: Cache Miss. Job enqueued for background worker. Client must begin polling status_url.

sample_payload.message: Content is being prepared. Poll /status/ for updates.
Book with Gutenberg ID 999999 not found.

endpoints.name: Ebook Cache Job Status / Download Url
endpoints.description: Poll the caching status. Returns status checks and the final S3 download URL.

failed.error: S3 upload failed: An error occurred (AccessControlListNotSupported)

endpoints.notes: When state is 'ready', the 'url' field contains a secure temporary S3 Presigned URL (valid for 1 hour). Use 'file_size_bytes' to drive the mobile app's download progress percentage tracker.
